calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #5, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-15-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sheila Robello for Thomas Lucas (Trustee). James McCarthy for Ray Erdmann (Beneficiary/Respondent). Winnie Kwong for Cyndy Lessig.

Ms. Robello stated that she believed her petition was procedurally in order, that their duty was to both beneficiaries, and that their neutral position should not be considered an agreement or disagreement with either party. Mr. McCarthy and Ms. Kwong presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the offset of Mr. Erdmann's share. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ J. Alameda Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.

Off Calendar Oct-16-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Sheila Robello appearing for successor trustee Tom Lucas. Terms of sale stated by counsel. Sale is confirmed at $850,000.00. Additional Bond in the amount of $769,000.00 is required. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Patty Hubble. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
